actions.text: Pull Spotify, Apple, YouTube, TikTok, Shazam, Chartmetric numbers.
Reconcile royalty statements and expected payouts.
Audit missing ISRC / ISWC / PRO registration / unsigned splits.
Decide next month’s pushes: songs, playlists, sync targets, co-writes.
Complete Spotify OAuth login through AX-L Mania Player PKCE flow.
Store tokens securely in macOS Keychain, not in vault markdown.
